hero.subtitle: An independent wealth management firm drawing on decades of private wealth expertise to deliver best-in-class solutions for discerning families and institutions.

homepage.wealthManagementDesc: Strategic partnerships with 11 major international private banks, delivering institutional-grade research and unbiased investment solutions.
homepage.familyOfficeDesc: Comprehensive family wealth governance including trusts, estate planning, philanthropy, and next-generation financial education.
homepage.legacyPlanningDesc: Enabling clients and beneficiaries to obtain maximum value through wealth transfer across multiple generations and jurisdictions.

about.title: Built on Trust, Driven by Insight
about.paragraph1: Blackhorn Wealth Management is an independent, Hong Kong-based firm providing sophisticated investment solutions to high-net-worth individuals, families, and institutions. We combine deep market knowledge with a disciplined, research-driven approach.
about.paragraph2: Our team draws on decades of experience across private banking, asset management, and family office advisory — delivering personalised strategies that preserve and grow wealth across generations.
about.heroHeading: Partnership is our foundation. Success is our shared journey.
about.heroSubtext: Being a privately owned and managed organization means we prioritize people over short-term gains. Your achievements directly shape our own.
about.navVisionDesc: Discover the principles that guide Blackhorn's approach to wealth management and long-term value creation.
about.navTeamDesc: Meet the experienced professionals behind Blackhorn — leaders from top-tier global financial institutions.
about.navAwardsDesc: Explore the industry recognition and accolades earned through our commitment to excellence.
about.navLocationDesc: Find our Hong Kong office and get in touch with the Blackhorn team.
about.teamHeroSubtext: With decades of experience across top-tier international financial institutions, our leadership team brings deep industry insight and strategic vision.
about.locationAddress: Room 705-708, 7/F, Bank of America Tower, 12 Harcourt Road, Central, Hong Kong
about.pillarExpertiseDesc: Our team comprises professionals with decades of experience in their respective fields. We believe that maintaining a diverse team of experts is the best way to serve our clients. From private wealth management to deal sourcing and legacy planning, our advisors will work with you to tailor custom solutions.
about.pillarPhilosophyDesc: We take on a holistic view of managing client assets – looking beyond traditional investment returns. Our investment philosophy is guided by a strategic long-term view, emphasizing portfolio diversity with downside protection.
about.pillarCommitmentDesc: We offer institutional services on a personalized level. Our advisors are committed to deliver resilient and sustainable long-term results that are tailored to you and your family’s goals.
about.pillarPartnershipsDesc: As an external asset manager, we partner with the most reputable private banks. These trusted partnerships ensure that clients gain access to a diverse array of products and services to best suit their needs. Our advisors are able to manage portfolios across platforms to consolidate assets all under one roof.
about.valuesHeading: Blackhorn was founded on the values of
about.valuesSubtext: As a privately owned and managed organization, we focus on fostering long-term relationships within our partnerships. Your success is essential to our own success.

visionPage.title: Our Vision
visionPage.heroHeading: We envision a world where wealth is managed with purpose, clarity, and enduring foresight.
visionPage.heroSubtext: Our holistic approach looks beyond traditional investment performance to safeguard and elevate our clients’ prosperity across generations.
visionPage.paragraph2: We are guided by a long-term global perspective—identifying structural trends, filtering out short-term noise, and investing with discipline and intention. By prioritising sustainable growth and rigorous research, we build portfolios that are resilient, relevant, and positioned for what lies ahead.
visionPage.paragraph3: Capital protection stands at the core of our vision. Through robust risk management, thoughtful diversification, and adaptive strategies, we ensure our clients’ assets remain secure through every market cycle. Preserving wealth is not simply a principle; it is a responsibility we uphold with unwavering commitment.
visionPage.paragraph4: True wealth, however, extends far beyond the portfolio. Our vision embraces the full spectrum of financial stewardship—tax efficiency, estate and succession planning, philanthropic aspirations, and family governance. We strive to align every dimension of a client’s financial life with their long-term goals, values, and legacy.
visionPage.paragraph5: Our mission is clear: to preserve, enhance, and harmonise wealth in a way that endures—today, tomorrow, and for generations to come.

aboutHub.cardAdvisorsDesc: Our advisory board brings specialized expertise in venture investing, legal estate planning, and fintech.

aboutLayout.ctaDescription: Speak with our team to explore how we can tailor our services to your needs.

expertise.title: Our Expertise
expertise.subtitle: Our team comprises professionals with decades of experience in their respective fields. We believe that maintaining a diverse team of experts is the best way to serve our clients.
expertise.intro: From private wealth management to deal sourcing and legacy planning, our advisors will work with you to tailor custom solutions. Every member of our team brings deep domain expertise and a commitment to understanding your unique circumstances.
expertise.investmentCapabilitiesDesc: Our investment team has managed billions in client assets across equities, fixed income, derivatives, private equity, and structured products. We combine institutional-grade research with hands-on portfolio management to deliver actionable insights and superior risk-adjusted returns.
expertise.structuredProductsDesc: Structured products represent a significant portion of our business. Our team has extensive experience designing and implementing bespoke structured solutions that provide tailored risk-return profiles, including capital protection features, yield enhancement, and leveraged exposure to specific market themes.
expertise.diverseTeamDesc: Our professionals bring experience from leading institutions including UBS, Morgan Stanley, Credit Suisse, HSBC, and Citi. This breadth of backgrounds — spanning investment banking, wealth management, and family office advisory — enables us to deliver comprehensive solutions that address every dimension of our clients' financial lives.

philosophy.title: Our Philosophy
philosophy.subtitle: We take on a holistic view of managing client assets — looking beyond traditional investment returns.
philosophy.intro: Our investment philosophy is guided by a strategic long-term view, emphasizing portfolio diversity with downside protection. We believe that wealth preservation is as important as wealth creation, and our approach reflects this conviction at every level.
philosophy.longTermViewDesc: We focus on identifying enduring trends and positioning portfolios to benefit from structural shifts in the global economy. Short-term market noise does not drive our decision-making; instead, we maintain a disciplined, research-driven approach that prioritizes sustainable growth over speculative gains.
philosophy.downsideProtectionDesc: Protecting capital in adverse market conditions is a cornerstone of our philosophy. We employ rigorous risk management techniques — including hedging strategies, portfolio stress testing, and dynamic asset allocation — to ensure that client portfolios are resilient through market cycles.
philosophy.beyondTraditionalDesc: True wealth management extends far beyond portfolio performance. We consider the full picture: tax efficiency, estate and succession planning, philanthropic goals, and family governance. Our holistic approach ensures that every aspect of a client's financial life is aligned with their broader vision and values.

partnerships.title: Our Partnerships
partnerships.subtitle: As an external asset manager, we partner with the most reputable private banks. These trusted partnerships ensure that clients gain access to a diverse array of products and services.
partnerships.intro: Our advisors are able to manage portfolios across platforms to consolidate assets all under one roof. This multi-bank model gives clients the flexibility to access best-in-class products from each institution while maintaining a single point of contact.
partnerships.bankingPartnersDesc: Blackhorn maintains strategic partnerships with 11 major international private banks, where our firm is an approved asset manager on their platforms. Our partners include leading global institutions across Europe, Asia, and North America.
partnerships.eamModelDesc: As an independent external asset manager (EAM), Blackhorn operates free from the conflicts of interest inherent in traditional private banking. We are not tied to any single institution's product shelf. Instead, we select the best solutions from across our banking partners based solely on our clients' interests.
partnerships.portfolioConsolidationDesc: Many high-net-worth families hold assets across multiple banks and jurisdictions. Our multi-platform capability enables us to provide a unified view of your entire wealth — consolidating reporting, risk analysis, and performance tracking across all custodians.

commitment.title: Commitment to Results
commitment.subtitle: We offer institutional services on a personalized level. Our advisors are committed to deliver resilient and sustainable long-term results.
commitment.intro: At Blackhorn, results are measured not just by portfolio returns, but by the degree to which we help clients achieve their broader financial objectives — across generations and jurisdictions. Every recommendation we make is tailored to you and your family's goals.
commitment.institutionalRigourDesc: Our team applies the same analytical frameworks and due diligence standards used by the world's leading institutional investors. Yet every client relationship is deeply personal. You will have direct access to senior advisors who understand your situation in detail and are accountable for the outcomes we deliver.
commitment.sustainablePerformanceDesc: We focus on generating consistent, risk-adjusted returns that compound over time. Our investment committee meets regularly to review portfolio positioning, evaluate emerging opportunities, and stress-test strategies against evolving market conditions.
commitment.transparencyDesc: Clients receive comprehensive performance reporting and regular portfolio reviews. We believe in complete transparency regarding fees, risks, and investment rationale. Our advisors are always available to discuss portfolio strategy and address any concerns.

wealthManagement.title: Wealth Management
wealthManagement.desc: Comprehensive portfolio construction, risk management, and investment advisory tailored to your financial objectives and risk appetite.

familyOffice.title: Family Office Services
familyOffice.desc: Holistic family wealth governance, succession planning, and concierge services designed for multigenerational prosperity.

investmentAdvisory.title: Investment Advisory
investmentAdvisory.desc: Curated access to global opportunities across public markets, private equity, real estate, and alternative investments.

estateLegacy.title: Estate & Legacy Planning
estateLegacy.desc: Strategic estate structuring, philanthropic planning, and wealth transfer solutions to secure your family's lasting legacy.

realEstateFinancing.title: Real Estate & Financing
realEstateFinancing.desc: Bespoke property investment strategies and financing solutions across Asia-Pacific markets.

servicesHub.title: The Client
servicesHub.description1: As an independent and privately managed organisation, we can focus exclusively on client needs. Our team of professionals is ready to work with you on creating a total solution for your wealth planning needs.
servicesHub.description2: The advisory process with clients is based on understanding, collaboration, and results.
servicesHub.portfolioManagementDesc: Strategic partnerships with 11 major international private banks. Institutional-grade research delivering unique, unbiased, and actionable insights from investment analysis to execution.
servicesHub.familyOfficeDesc: Comprehensive family wealth governance including trusts, estate planning, philanthropy, and next-generation financial education for multigenerational legacy.
servicesHub.dealSourcingDesc: Exclusive network and capabilities to access proprietary investments across private equity, venture capital, and niche sectors with appropriate downside protection.
servicesHub.legacyPlanningDesc: Enabling clients and beneficiaries to obtain maximum value through wealth transfer across multiple generations and jurisdictions.
servicesHub.realEstateFinancingDesc: Structural financing and mortgages for real estate transactions, plus bespoke financing for illiquid or unique assets.
servicesHub.heroSubtext: Our independence empowers us to create fully tailored wealth solutions centred on your priorities. We guide you through a process defined by insight, partnership, and measurable outcomes.
servicesHub.wmHeroHeading: Independent Wealth Management Backed by Global Banking Partnerships
servicesHub.wmHeroSubtext: We have strategic partnerships with 11 major international private banks, where our firm is an approved asset manager on their platforms.
servicesHub.wmPortfolioManagementDesc: Our team of experienced professionals combines a deep understanding of the market with institutional-grade research to deliver unique, unbiased, and actionable insights to our clients. By acting as a gatekeeper across all aspects of the investment cycle, we are able to deliver a total solution from investment analysis to risk assessment, position monitoring, and execution.
servicesHub.wmInvestmentAdvisoryDesc: Curated access to global opportunities across public markets, private equity, real estate, and alternative investments. Our advisors leverage our extensive banking network to source exclusive deals, including structural financing and mortgages for real estate transactions, plus bespoke financing for illiquid or unique assets.
servicesHub.wmLegacyPlanningDesc: Enabling clients and beneficiaries to obtain maximum value through wealth transfer across multiple generations and jurisdictions. We focus on strategic estate structuring, philanthropic planning, and wealth transfer solutions to secure your family's lasting legacy.
servicesHub.foHeroSubtext: Our family office advisory team guides prominent families in establishing robust governance structures that elevate wealth management to a strategic, multi-dimensional level. Through coordinated legal, financial, and personal planning, we help ensure that your family’s wealth and legacy endure across generations.
servicesHub.foWillEstateDesc: A will is a legal document that allows an individual to direct how the property to which he is beneficially entitled at the time of his death to be distributed after his death. The benefits of having a will include appointing a trustworthy person to administer their estate, distributing the estate according to their wishes, avoiding a lengthy probate process, minimising estate tax duty, and avoiding disputes among family members.
servicesHub.foPhilanthropyDesc: A majority of family offices engage in philanthropy and impact investing. Family offices facilitate philanthropic investments directly or through other mechanisms, such as a family foundation or donor advised funds. The main reason to explore this topic is to educate the next generation of wealth owners to build a lasting legacy.
servicesHub.foTrustsDesc: A trust is set up by a trust deed between the settlor and the trustee and often accompanied by a letter of wishes. Once the assets are transferred into the trust, the trustee has control over the assets. Trusts are often set up for the purpose of the welfare, education and well-being of family, and assist with future generations’ estate planning, privacy, tax planning and asset protection.
servicesHub.foEPADesc: With an enduring power of attorney, the donor can appoint and empower the attorney to manage his/her property and financial affairs when he/she becomes mentally incapable.
servicesHub.foAdvanceDirectiveDesc: An advance directive for health care is a statement in which a person indicates when mentally competent the form of health care they would like at a future time when they are no longer competent.
servicesHub.foTaxPlanningDesc: Strategic tax planning across jurisdictions to optimise your family’s tax position while ensuring full compliance with all applicable regulations.
servicesHub.foInsurancePlanningDesc: Comprehensive insurance solutions designed to protect family wealth, including life insurance, key person insurance, and wealth transfer strategies.
servicesHub.foInfoPlaceholderDesc: Custom family office structure diagram will be provided by Blackhorn.

awardsPage.title: Awards &
awardsPage.description: Since our founding, Blackhorn has been recognised by the industry's most respected institutions for excellence in independent wealth management.

insights.hubSubtext: Explore fresh thinking, timely updates, and deep‑dive stories that matter. From emerging trends to strategic viewpoints, our Insight & News hub keeps you informed, inspired, and ready for what’s next.

insights.eventsHero: Forward‑Looking Ideas for the Modern Investor
insights.eventsSubtext: Explore curated events covering market shifts, digital transformation, and new wealth‑building strategies. Learn how innovation is reshaping portfolios and expanding opportunity across asset classes.
insights.pressHero: Recognized for Advancing the Future of Finance
insights.pressSubtext: Explore media coverage and press recognition that showcase our role in shaping financial innovation and strategic market direction.

careers.title: Join Our
careers.subtitle: Are you a passionate and driven Wealth Management Professional looking to take your career to the next level?
careers.opportunityP1: Blackhorn Wealth Management is looking for experienced Private Bankers and Asset Managers to join our growing Multi-Family Office / External Asset Manager platform.
careers.opportunityP2: We partner with top tier banks and private funds to provide our clients with flexible and diverse wealth management solutions. Our bankers and Portfolio Managers encourage idea sharing in our collaborative setup, and clients enjoy having access to multiple financial institutions managed by a single point of contact.
careers.opportunityP3: At Blackhorn, you will have the freedom to build deep, long-term relationships with your clients while leveraging our institutional infrastructure, compliance framework, and extensive banking network. We believe that the best outcomes are achieved when talented professionals are empowered to do their best work.
careers.benefitIndependenceDesc: Work within an independent platform free from large bank bureaucracy. Focus on delivering the best outcomes for your clients without institutional constraints.
careers.benefitPartnershipDesc: Collaborative environment where idea sharing is encouraged. Our bankers and Portfolio Managers work together to deliver holistic solutions.
careers.benefitPlatformDesc: Manage portfolios across 11 international private bank partnerships. Offer clients access to multiple financial institutions through a single point of contact.
careers.benefitGrowthDesc: Join a rapidly growing firm with award-winning leadership. Be part of a team that has been recognised by WealthBriefingAsia, Capital CEO, and LGT Private Banking.
careers.ctaDescription: If you are an experienced private banker looking for a more rewarding career, we'd love to hear from you.
careers.referralQuestion: Know someone who'd be a great fit?
careers.referralAnswer: Ask about our employee referral programme.
careers.heroHeading: Work with us — your growth is our investment.
careers.heroSubtext: Join a team of dedicated professionals shaping the future of wealth management in Asia.

disclaimerPage.title: Disclaimer
disclaimerPage.paragraph1: This website is published by Blackhorn Wealth Management Limited (“Blackhorn”), a corporation licensed and regulated by the Securities and Futures Commission of Hong Kong (CE Number: BNM924) for Type 4 (Advising on Securities) and Type 9 (Asset Management) regulated activities. Information contained in this website is intended for Hong Kong residents only. It shall not be regarded as an offer, solicitation, invitation, advertisement, inducement, recommendation, or representation of any kind or form whatsoever. Persons accessing this website are required to inform themselves and to comply with any restriction or regulation in any jurisdiction.
disclaimerPage.paragraph2: All information contained within this website is confidential and proprietary and is the property of Blackhorn. All intellectual property rights relating to the information contained in this website, including without limitation all copyright and trademarks, are the property of Blackhorn. No reproduction, transmission, or distribution of any part of this website is permitted without the prior written consent of Blackhorn.
disclaimerPage.paragraph3: Blackhorn does not accept any liability for the accuracy, timeliness, completeness, reliability, performance, or fitness for any particular purpose of the information contained in this website, or for any loss arising from any use of or reliance on information contained in this website. Investment involves risks. Past performance is not indicative of future performance. The value of investments and the income from them can go down as well as up.

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.section1: Blackhorn Wealth Management Limited (“Blackhorn”, “we”, “us”, or “our”) is committed to protecting the privacy and security of your personal data. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website or engage our services.
privacyPage.section2: We may collect personal information that you voluntarily provide to us when you contact us through our website, subscribe to our communications, or engage our services. This may include your name, email address, phone number, and other information relevant to providing our services.
privacyPage.section3: We use the information we collect to provide, maintain, and improve our services, to communicate with you, to comply with legal obligations, and for other purposes described in this policy.
privacyPage.section4: We implement appropriate technical and organisational measures to protect your personal data against unauthorised or unlawful processing, accidental loss, destruction, or damage.
privacyPage.section5: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at
privacyPage.placeholder: This is a placeholder privacy policy. The full policy will be published upon legal review.

importantNotice.title: Beware of Scams Impersonating
importantNotice.paragraph1: Blackhorn Wealth Management Limited (“Blackhorn”) has recently received a number of enquiries concerning suspected scams involving fraudsters impersonating Blackhorn to engage in fraudulent activities, with the intention of illegally deceiving clients and obtaining financial gains through the trust placed in Blackhorn. The forms of impersonation include but are not limited to:
importantNotice.scamType1: imitating Blackhorn's domain name or creating counterfeit Blackhorn websites;
importantNotice.scamType2: impersonating Blackhorn employees to induce clients to transfer money to their bank accounts for investment and/or completing their forged investment forms to obtain personal details, etc.
importantNotice.reminder: Blackhorn hereby reminds all clients and investors to pay attention and stay vigilant against deception.
importantNotice.officialWebsite: It is hereby specifically stated that Blackhorn's official website is
importantNotice.verifyIdentity: If any person attempts to claim himself/herself as a staff of Blackhorn and requests for your personal data and/or your bank information whilst inducing you to invest in any investment product and/or transfer money for the investment, stay vigilant and verify his/her identity by contacting us if you are in doubt. You may also report the suspected crime/scam activities to the local law enforcement authorities. Blackhorn reserves the right to discharge its responsibilities through legal means when fraudulent activities are identified.
importantNotice.contactPrompt: Should you have any questions, please contact us at
